falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above 5,500 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above this key resistance level would indicate a bullish trend reversal, invalidating the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting a new phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score drops below 30 in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant decrease in the blowoff score would indicate reduced volatility/momentum, contradicting the current pattern's energy and invalidating the 'UNKNOWN' verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 200-day moving average crosses above the 50-day moving average on the daily chart
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This bullish technical crossover would signal a shift in trend momentum, directly contradicting the current 'HOLD' phase and pattern match assumptions.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
